free_text: Measurement of scattering cross section of liquid and
solid hydrogen, deuterium and deuterium hydride for
Two pairs of BF3 detector tubes behind each other
U-235 fission at 25 meV neutron energy
Cryostat was used in all measurements.
-Parahydrogen was obtained via transformation in sample
chamber, which bottom was covered with mixture of
activated charcoal and neodymium oxide, catalyzing the
transformation during 24 hr. The residual concentration
Scattering cross section were calculated as:
N - number of molecules per cm3  ,
I0 -count rate with empty sample (dead-time corrected),
I - count rate with sample (dead-time corrected) ,
t0 - measurement time with empty sample,
